mapper.sql: species_id, id, male_parent_id, female_parent_id, morph, bloodline, gender_category, breeding_category, breeder, clutch_date, hatch_date, purchase_from, purchase_price, purchase_date, sales_category, sales_to, sales_price_tax_ex, sales_price_tax, sales_price_tax_in, sales_date, death_date, note, create_user, create_at, update_user, update_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM individual ORDER BY species_id, id
SELECT id FROM individual WHERE id LIKE CONCAT(#{idPrefix}, '%') AND CHAR_LENGTH(id) = 6
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO individual ( species_id, id, male_parent_id, female_parent_id, morph, bloodline, gender_category, breeding_category, breeder, clutch_date, hatch_date, purchase_from, purchase_price, purchase_date, sales_category, sales_to, sales_price_tax_ex, sales_price_tax, sales_price_tax_in, sales_date, death_date, note, create_user, create_at, update_user, update_at ) VALUES ( #{speciesId}, #{id}, #{maleParentId}, #{femaleParentId}, #{morph}, #{bloodline}, #{genderCategory}, #{breedingCategory}, #{breeder}, #{clutchDate}, #{hatchDate}, #{purchaseFrom}, #{purchasePrice}, #{purchaseDate}, #{salesCategory}, #{salesTo}, #{salesPriceTaxEx}, #{salesPriceTax}, #{salesPriceTaxIn}, #{salesDate}, #{deathDate}, #{note}, #{createUser}, #{createAt}, #{updateUser}, #{updateAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE individual SET male_parent_id = #{individual.maleParentId}, female_parent_id = #{individual.femaleParentId}, morph = #{individual.morph}, bloodline = #{individual.bloodline}, gender_category = #{individual.genderCategory}, breeding_category = #{individual.breedingCategory}, breeder = #{individual.breeder}, clutch_date = #{individual.clutchDate}, hatch_date = #{individual.hatchDate}, purchase_from = #{individual.purchaseFrom}, purchase_price = #{individual.purchasePrice}, purchase_date = #{individual.purchaseDate}, sales_category = #{individual.salesCategory}, sales_to = #{individual.salesTo}, sales_price_tax_ex = #{individual.salesPriceTaxEx}, sales_price_tax = #{individual.salesPriceTax}, sales_price_tax_in = #{individual.salesPriceTaxIn}, sales_date = #{individual.salesDate}, death_date = #{individual.deathDate}, note = #{individual.note}, update_user = #{individual.updateUser}, update_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE species_id = #{speciesId} AND id = #{id}
